name: Qualifying Advanced Energy Project Credit

eligibility.description: Must apply for and receive an allocation from the Secretary. Covers manufacturing of solar/wind equipment, fuel cells, energy storage, and critical material processing. 6% base rate if labor requirements are not met.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 30% investment tax credit (if wage/apprenticeship rules met) for re-equipping, expanding, or establishing facilities that produce renewable energy property, EVs, or grid modernization equipment.
